scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface**: Central foreground, narrow asphalt road with light gray color, smooth with minor patches and wear.  
- **Curb**: Right edge of the road, light gray concrete, separating the road from adjacent structures.  
- **Concrete cylindrical structure**: Left foreground, light gray, partially embedded in grass, with open top (no visible text or markings).  
- **Grass and earth**: Left of the road (foreground to midground), dense green grass with patches of exposed dark earth.  


### Midground  
- **Grassy embankment**: Left midground, sloping upward with thick green grass (taller on the upper side).  
- **Stone wall**: Left midground, behind the embankment, constructed of large gray concrete blocks; has an open rectangular section (no visible text).  
- **Cinder block building (right side)**: Right midground, light gray cinder block facade with a flat roof; one window with light gray curtains (no visible text). A wooden support pole (light brown, leaning) and planks rest against its right edge.  
- **Adjacent building (right midground)**: Behind the cinder block structure, light gray concrete building with a flat roof extension (no covering on the roof); features a small dark window and a metal gate (dark gray) on the side.  
- **Utility poles and wires**: Left midground to center background, wooden utility pole with multiple black wires stretching diagonally across the sky (10+ wires visible, extending into the background). Additional poles with wires are visible in the distant background.  
- **Distant buildings**: Center background, cluster of multi-story structures (various shades of white and gray), partially obscured by trees.  

### Background  
- **Hillside vegetation**: Center to left background, dense green trees and shrubs on a sloping hill.  
- **Distant hill**: Far background (center to right), faint light blue hill (elevated terrain) under overcast sky.  
- **Sky**: Entire upper portion, covered in thick gray clouds with no visible sun.  

### Other Details  
- **No vehicles, license plates, traffic lights, street lamps, fire hydrants, or road markings** (e.g., lane lines, crosswalks) are visible.  
- **No text, signs, banners, or stickers** on any structures, poles, or surfaces (all facades, walls, and structures lack visible inscriptions).  
- **Building roofs**: Most are flat (cinder block and concrete structures); one building in the distance has a partially visible tiled roof (light brown).  
- **Fencing**: Metal gate on the right midground building; no other fences or barriers visible.  
- **Terrain**: Hilly (sloping road with elevated land on the left and distant hill in background).
